CVE-2021-39359.title: In GNOME libgda through 6.0.0, gda-web-provider.c does not enable ...
CVE-2021-39359.description: In GNOME libgda through 6.0.0, gda-web-provider.c does not enable TLS certificate verification on the SoupSessionSync objects it creates, leaving users vulnerable to network MITM attacks. NOTE: this is similar to CVE-2016-20011.
